subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down unto them that have believed in God, the Revealer of verses, that the attraction of their Lord's Call may seize them and bring them unto the station of nearness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن بالله منزل الآیات لیاخذه جذب ندآء ربه و یبلغه الی مقام القرب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @knowledge; recognition of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
